user.title: Sign in to the PetLibro Lite cloud
user.description:
Use the same email + password as the **PetLibro Lite** mobile app (not your Home Assistant login, not a Tuya developer account). One sign-in gets you the whole integration — LAN feeding, schedules, sensors, and the live camera.

{reason}

manual_ip.title: Enter feeder LAN IP
manual_ip.description: Didn't find a feeder via UDP broadcast. That's common on HAOS VMs or multi-subnet networks. Paste the feeder's LAN IP and we'll probe it directly.

pick.title: Pick a feeder
pick.description: Multiple feeders were found on this account. Choose which one to add.

error.cloud_auth: Login rejected — see message above the form for the server's reason.
error.no_devices_found: No feeder responded on that IP. Confirm the feeder is powered on and connected to Wi-Fi.

init.title: Re-authenticate PetLibro Lite
init.description:
Sign in again to refresh the cloud session. Use this when video stops working, the feeder's LAN IP changed, or you factory-reset and re-paired the feeder. Discovery reruns the same way as first-time setup.

{reason}

manual_ip.title: Enter feeder LAN IP
manual_ip.description: Didn't find the feeder via UDP broadcast. Paste its LAN IP and we'll probe it directly.

error.cloud_auth: Login rejected — see message above the form for the server's reason.
error.no_devices_found: No feeder responded on that IP. Confirm the feeder is powered on and connected to Wi-Fi.
